practices.name: Box Breathing
practices.description: 4-count inhale, hold, exhale, hold. Activates parasympathetic nervous system.
practices.descriptionEs: 4 tiempos inhalar, sostener, exhalar, sostener. Activa el sistema nervioso parasimpático.
practices.scienceNote: Box breathing reduces cortisol by ~25% and improves HRV (Ma et al., 2017, Frontiers in Psychology).

practices.name: Weekly Intention Setting
practices.description: Write 3 specific goals for this training week. Visualize completing each one.
practices.descriptionEs: Escribe 3 metas específicas para esta semana de entrenamiento. Visualiza completar cada una.
practices.scienceNote: Goal-setting increases performance by 20-25% (Locke & Latham, 2002, American Psychologist).

practices.name: Body Scan Meditation
practices.description: Progressive scan from feet to head, releasing tension in each muscle group.
practices.descriptionEs: Escaneo progresivo de pies a cabeza, liberando tensión en cada grupo muscular.
steps: Slowly move up: calves, thighs, hips
Continue through torso, arms, neck, head
stepsEs: Continuar por torso, brazos, cuello, cabeza
practices.scienceNote: Body scan meditation reduces anxiety by 30% and improves sleep quality (Huberman Lab, 2021; Dreeben et al., 2013).

practices.name: 4-7-8 Breathing
practices.description: Dr. Andrew Weil's technique: inhale 4, hold 7, exhale 8 counts.
practices.descriptionEs: Técnica del Dr. Andrew Weil: inhalar 4, sostener 7, exhalar 8 tiempos.
practices.scienceNote: Extended exhale activates vagus nerve, lowers heart rate ~15% (Zaccaro et al., 2018).

practices.name: Visualization: Perfect Form
practices.description: Mentally rehearse today's key exercises with perfect form. Feel each muscle.
practices.descriptionEs: Ensayar mentalmente los ejercicios clave de hoy con forma perfecta. Sentir cada músculo.
practices.scienceNote: Mental rehearsal increases strength gains by 13.5% through neural pathway activation (Ranganathan et al., 2004, Neuropsychologia).

practices.name: Gratitude Journal
practices.description: Write 3 things about your body/training you're grateful for.
practices.descriptionEs: Escribe 3 cosas de tu cuerpo/entrenamiento por las que estás agradecido.
steps: Write 1 training win from this week
practices.scienceNote: Gratitude practice increases dopamine and serotonin, improving motivation (Emmons & McCullough, 2003).

practices.name: Warrior Breathing
practices.description: Wim Hof-inspired power breathing. 30 deep breaths, hold, repeat.
practices.descriptionEs: Respiración de poder inspirada en Wim Hof. 30 respiraciones profundas, sostener, repetir.
stepsEs: Después de última exhalación, sostener vacío
practices.scienceNote: Power breathing increases adrenaline and focus, priming fight-or-flight for training (Kox et al., 2014, PNAS).

practices.name: Combat Visualization
practices.description: Visualize boxing combinations, footwork, defensive movements.
practices.descriptionEs: Visualizar combinaciones de boxeo, juego de pies, movimientos defensivos.
stepsEs: Sentir el ritmo del juego de pies
practices.scienceNote: Motor imagery activates same neural circuits as physical practice (Jeannerod, 1995, Behavioral and Brain Sciences).

practices.name: Physiological Sigh
practices.description: Stanford's fastest stress relief: double inhale through nose, long exhale through mouth.
practices.descriptionEs: El alivio de estrés más rápido de Stanford: doble inhalación por nariz, exhalación larga por boca.
stepsEs: Exhalación lenta y larga por boca
practices.scienceNote: Physiological sighs are the fastest way to reduce real-time stress (Balban et al., 2023, Cell Reports Medicine; Huberman Lab).

practices.name: Flow State Priming
practices.description: Prepare your brain for flow state during today's upper body session.
practices.descriptionEs: Preparar tu cerebro para estado flow durante la sesión de tren superior de hoy.
steps: Set ONE focus goal for workout
practices.scienceNote: Flow state increases performance 500% and learning speed 490% (McKinsey/Kotler, 2014, Rise of Superman).

practices.name: Yoga Nidra (Guided)
practices.description: Non-sleep deep rest (NSDR). Lie down for guided deep relaxation.
practices.descriptionEs: Descanso profundo sin dormir (NSDR). Acostarse para relajación profunda guiada.
steps: Scan body from toes to head very slowly
When timer rings, slowly open eyes
stepsEs: Escanear cuerpo de pies a cabeza muy lento
Cuando suene el timer, abrir ojos lentamente
practices.scienceNote: NSDR restores dopamine levels by 65% and enhances motor learning (Huberman Lab, 2021; Kamei et al., 2000).

practices.name: Week Review Journal
practices.description: Review training week. What went well? What to improve?
practices.descriptionEs: Revisar semana de entrenamiento. ¿Qué salió bien? ¿Qué mejorar?
practices.scienceNote: Self-reflection improves skill acquisition by 23% (Di Stefano et al., 2014, Harvard Business School).

practices.name: Loving-Kindness Meditation
practices.description: Direct compassion toward yourself, then outward. Reduces inflammation markers.
practices.descriptionEs: Dirigir compasión hacia ti mismo, luego hacia afuera. Reduce marcadores de inflamación.
steps: Think: 'May I be healthy and strong'
Think: 'May I be free from suffering'
practices.scienceNote: Loving-kindness meditation reduces CRP inflammation markers by 15% (Pace et al., 2009, Psychoneuroendocrinology).

practices.name: Sleep Protocol Prep
practices.description: Prepare for optimal sleep before training week starts. Lower core temp, dim lights.
practices.descriptionEs: Preparar sueño óptimo antes de que comience la semana de entrenamiento. Bajar temperatura, atenuar luces.
steps: Write tomorrow's plan to offload worry
stepsEs: Escribir plan de mañana para soltar preocupación
practices.scienceNote: Sleep optimization increases testosterone 15% and GH secretion 70% (Leproult & Van Cauter, 2011, JAMA).

quickRoutines.name: Morning Activation
quickRoutines.description: 5-min box breathing to start the day focused.
quickRoutines.descriptionEs: 5 min de respiración cuadrada para empezar el día enfocado.

quickRoutines.name: Pre-Workout Focus
quickRoutines.description: Power breathing to prime CNS for training.
quickRoutines.descriptionEs: Respiración de poder para preparar el SNC para entrenar.

quickRoutines.name: Quick Stress Relief
quickRoutines.description: Physiological sigh — fastest evidence-based stress relief.
quickRoutines.descriptionEs: Suspiro fisiológico — el alivio de estrés más rápido basado en evidencia.

quickRoutines.name: Sleep Wind-Down
quickRoutines.description: Body scan to release tension before sleep.
quickRoutines.descriptionEs: Escaneo corporal para liberar tensión antes de dormir.

quickRoutines.name: Deep Recovery (NSDR)
quickRoutines.descriptionEs: Descanso profundo sin dormir. Restaura dopamina +65%.
